title: Oberonia muelleriana
taxonomy: Oberonia muelleriana is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This classification is based on its shared characteristics and morphological features with other orchids. Specifically, Oberonia muelleriana is a member of the subtribe Malaxideae within the tribe Malaxidinae. Further classification places it within the genus Oberonia, a group of epiphytic orchids. The species is endemic to the Pacific Islands, including Fiji.
